description: Retrieves an authorization token that can be used to authenticate to an Amazon ECR registry.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: The authorization token obtained via GetAuthorizationToken allows authentication to ECR using AWS IAM credentials, which an attacker could use with compromised credentials.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.technique: T1550.001 - Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token
unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: The ECR authorization token is an application access token that can be used to authenticate Docker clients to pull or push container images.

securityImplications: Attackers might use GetAuthorizationToken to authenticate a Docker client to Amazon ECR, enabling them to pull private container images containing proprietary code and secrets.
